author: y4rr
content: Plan: Match PyTorch behavior — GPU ops should either succeed on GPU or error, never silently download to CPU. Currently unary_map, ops/cumulative, ops/indexing, and many backward functions have 'if is_cuda { cpu()? }' patterns that hide missing GPU kernels behind 100x+ slowdowns. After kernel coverage is sufficient (current state: most common ops covered), convert these to errors: 'this op is not implemented on GPU; call .cpu() explicitly'. Phase 1: audit and convert the PTX kernel CPU fallbacks in kernels.rs (try_launch failures). Phase 2: convert the core op CPU fallbacks.
